title: contribution.created / contribution.edited / contribution.hidden / contribution.restored event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.8. Produced by epd2_deliberation_service.events.contribution_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_contribution_created_event (contribution.created), build_contribution_edited_event (contribution.edited), build_contribution_hidden_event (contribution.hidden), and build_contribution_restored_event (contribution.restored) - verified by reading events.py, all four call the identical payload function with no additional keys. Deliberately excludes created_at (see contribution_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot). Distinct from contribution.flagged, which adds flag_reason_code/note on top of this same base shape (see contribution-flagged-payload.v1.schema.json).
